note: Four Week-1 (2026) games used as a scaffold fixture for the game model and parlay builder. game_id follows the nflverse convention SEASON_WEEK_AWAY_HOME. `roof` mirrors the HOME team's stadium in teams.json — it is the game-day roof state the weather_game signal gates on. kickoff_utc doubles as the walk-forward information cutoff (nothing after it may inform the prediction).
